failure.symptom: Nextcloud Forms is a Nextcloud server plugin requiring full Nextcloud backend + database + auth. Cannot run standalone in browser. Bug confirmed via source code analysis: SubmissionService.php exportData() calls $file->getContent() without try-catch, fails on S3 placeholder files (single-space content). Fix adds exception handling and trim() check for whitespace-only files.
attempted: Source code analysis of buggy vs fix commit
failure.recommendation: 跳过，Nextcloud 插件需要完整后端环境，无法纯前端测试。Bug 已通过源码确认：exportData() 未处理 getContent() 异常和 S3 占位文件
